changeSet.author: pvranik
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO BACKUP_ACCESS_RIGHT (id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) select id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME from DOCUMENT where model_name = 'DomainAccessRight' ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET XML_DOC = excluded.XML_DOC, CREATED_BY = excluded.CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY = excluded.MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT = excluded.CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT = excluded.MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME = excluded.MODEL_NAME;

INSERT INTO BACKUP_ROLE (id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) select id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME from DOCUMENT as d where model_name = 'DomainRole' ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET XML_DOC = excluded.XML_DOC, CREATED_BY = excluded.CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY = excluded.MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT = excluded.CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT = excluded.MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME = excluded.MODEL_NAME;

INSERT INTO BACKUP_USER (id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) select id, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME from DOCUMENT as d where model_name = 'DomainUser' ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET XML_DOC = excluded.XML_DOC, CREATED_BY = excluded.CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY = excluded.MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT = excluded.CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT = excluded.MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME = excluded.MODEL_NAME;

MERGE INTO BACKUP_ACCESS_RIGHT u USING DOCUMENT d ON (d.id = u.id and d.model_name = 'DomainAccessRight') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET u.XML_DOC = d.XML_DOC, u.CREATED_BY = d.CREATED_BY, u.MODIFIED_BY = d.MODIFIED_BY, u.CREATED_AT = d.CREATED_AT, u.MODIFIED_AT = d.MODIFIED_AT, u.MODEL_NAME = d.MODEL_NAME WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ID, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) VALUES (d.ID, d.XML_DOC, d.CREATED_BY, d.MODIFIED_BY, d.CREATED_AT, d.MODIFIED_AT, d.MODEL_NAME);

MERGE INTO BACKUP_ROLE u USING DOCUMENT d ON (d.id = u.id and d.model_name = 'DomainRole') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET u.XML_DOC = d.XML_DOC, u.CREATED_BY = d.CREATED_BY, u.MODIFIED_BY = d.MODIFIED_BY, u.CREATED_AT = d.CREATED_AT, u.MODIFIED_AT = d.MODIFIED_AT, u.MODEL_NAME = d.MODEL_NAME WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ID, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) VALUES (d.ID, d.XML_DOC, d.CREATED_BY, d.MODIFIED_BY, d.CREATED_AT, d.MODIFIED_AT, d.MODEL_NAME);

MERGE INTO BACKUP_USER u USING DOCUMENT d ON (d.id = u.id and d.model_name = 'DomainUser') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET u.XML_DOC = d.XML_DOC, u.CREATED_BY = d.CREATED_BY, u.MODIFIED_BY = d.MODIFIED_BY, u.CREATED_AT = d.CREATED_AT, u.MODIFIED_AT = d.MODIFIED_AT, u.MODEL_NAME = d.MODEL_NAME WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ID, XML_DOC, CREATED_BY, MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_AT, MODIFIED_AT, MODEL_NAME) VALUES (d.ID, d.XML_DOC, d.CREATED_BY, d.MODIFIED_BY, d.CREATED_AT, d.MODIFIED_AT, d.MODEL_NAME);

update.where: name = 'abstract' and (value = '' or value is null)
